entities.name: KARANJIN
entities.description: A furanolflavonoid and major crystalline principle of karanja seeds that acts as a nitrification inhibitor

entities.name: KARANJA
entities.description: Pongamia glabra, the plant from whose seeds karanjin is derived

entities.name: NITRIFICATION INHIBITOR
entities.description: A substance that slows the conversion of ammonium to nitrate

entities.name: N-SERVE
entities.description: A commercial nitrification inhibitor used for comparison

entities.name: POT-CULTURE EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experimental setup used to test the efficacy of inhibitors on crops

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop used in the pot-culture experiments

entities.name: STRUCTURE ACTIVITY RELATIONSHIP STUDIES
entities.description: Studies used to determine the essential chemical components of karanjin for its inhibitory effect

entities.name: FURAN RING
entities.description: A specific chemical structure within karanjin essential for its inhibitory effect
